headline: Monday's session: top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index

headline: Alphabet Tumbles 6%, SpaceX Sinks 10% On Bond Sale: Stock Market Today
summary: Alphabet sinks 6% on a DeepMind departure as AI names drag the S&P 500 and Nasdaq lower; the Dow and small caps rise.
